metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins for task-driven development and productivity

plugins.name: ctx
plugins.description: Complete task-driven development workflow for .context/ folder management. Includes project setup (vision, architecture, techstack), planning (epic, investigate), task breakdown, and progress tracking with TDD support.

plugins.name: libref
plugins.description: Library and framework reference guides. Teaches Claude how to correctly use specific tools, libraries, and frameworks within your project conventions.
